nodes.name: 🔍 LinkedIn Guest API - Search Jobs
nodes.notes: Uses LinkedIn's FREE public guest API — no API key required. Returns HTML job cards posted in last 24h. f_TPR=r86400 means last 24 hours.

nodes.notes: Fetches the full job posting from LinkedIn's guest API — free, no key needed. Used to get description for ATS analysis.
